launch_inputs.decision_scope: Evaluate whether the team should buy, build, or partner for research and compliance evidence gathering tied to audit export workflows.
launch_inputs.evaluation_criteria: Decision quality, integration cost, operator workload, security posture, and time to usable evidence.
launch_inputs.candidate_vendors: Compare Tavily, Exa, and a build-only internal path using the provided market notes.

launch_inputs.decision_scope: Assess vendor options for external research augmentation without locking the workflow stack into a brittle single-provider dependency.
launch_inputs.evaluation_criteria: Coverage quality, operator trust, controllability, cost, and how cleanly outputs flow into briefs and deliverables.
launch_inputs.candidate_vendors: Use the uploaded notes as the baseline comparison set and recommend a decision posture.
